name: Catherine Wheel Cookies
recipeIngredient: 5/8 cup Butter, melted or 10 tablespoons Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour and baking powder.
3. Add the currants, ground almonds, anise seeds, sugar, and cinnamon.
4. Stir in the melted butter and beaten egg until a soft dough forms.
5. Pinch off walnut-sized pieces of the dough and roll into balls.
6. Place the balls on ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Flatten each ball with a fork to create a crisscross pattern.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Allow cookies to cool on a wire rack.
Yield: 2 1/2 dozen
